query:
SELECT q.questionText, q.explanation, c.title as caseTitle, c.diagnosis, c.tags, c.modality
FROM echoLibraryCaseQuestions q
JOIN echoLibraryCases c ON q.caseId = c.id
LIMIT 30;
command:
